objective: Add docstrings to the remaining scanner-flagged public test functions in the integration-style test files, including tests/test_history.py, tests/test_cli_doctor.py, tests/test_cli_compare.py, tests/test_event_bus.py, tests/test_dependencies.py, tests/test_identity.py, tests/test_smoke.py, tests/test_basic.py, tests/test_module_docstrings.py, and tests/test_surgical_mode_cli_and_controller.py.
